Developer Tools AI Tools

48 Developer Tools tools reviewed and rated. Click any tool for details, or use the AI Advisor to find the best fit for your goal.

AppWizzy
Freemium · Medium reliability
Builds working web apps from a description with AI, no coding required.
B12
Freemium · Medium reliability
AI website builder that creates and launches professional business sites fast.
BASE44
Freemium · Medium reliability
No-code platform that builds full-stack apps from natural-language prompts.
Emergent
Freemium · Medium reliability
Agentic AI that builds and ships full applications from prompts.
GooseAI
Paid · Medium reliability
Fully managed NLP-as-a-Service delivering GPT-Neo, GPT-J, and Fairseq models via API at up to 30% lower cost.
Hostinger OpenClaw
Paid · Medium reliability
Managed hosting for the Open Claw AI assistant with one-click setup.
Jules
Freemium · High reliability
Google's autonomous coding agent that fixes bugs and builds features.
Kilo
Freemium · Medium reliability
Open-source AI coding agent for VS Code that plans and writes code.
Kuberns
Freemium · Medium reliability
AI-powered cloud platform that auto-deploys and scales apps.
MIAPI
Freemium · Medium reliability
Unified API to build and run AI agents and automations.
Netlify
Freemium · High reliability
Platform to build, deploy, and scale modern web apps with AI workflows.
Novamira
Freemium · Medium reliability
AI coding agent that builds and ships software projects.
OpenAI Codex
Freemium · High reliability
OpenAI's agentic coding system that writes, edits, and runs code.
Respan
Freemium · Medium reliability
AI assistant that helps developers ship and analyze code.
Rival
Freemium · Medium reliability
AI agent platform for automating engineering tasks.
Supadev
Paid · Medium reliability
AI development assistant that builds and ships apps.
Vivgrid
Freemium · Medium reliability
Platform to build, deploy, and observe AI agents.
YouWare
Freemium · Medium reliability
AI platform to build and share web apps and creative projects.
GitHub Copilot
Paid · High reliability
AI pair programmer that autocompletes code inline across all major IDEs.
Claude Code
Paid · High reliability
Agentic coding CLI by Anthropic that edits files, runs tests, and automates dev tasks.
Cursor
Freemium · High reliability
AI-first code editor built on VS Code with deep chat, edit, and agent modes.
Tabnine
Freemium · Medium reliability
Enterprise code completion that runs locally for maximum data privacy.
Replit AI
Freemium · Medium reliability
Cloud IDE with built-in AI for building, running, and deploying apps in the browser.
Railway
Freemium · High reliability
Deploy apps, databases, and services in minutes — push from GitHub and Railway handles builds, hosting, and scaling with…
Devin
Paid · Medium reliability
Fully autonomous AI software engineer capable of completing complex coding projects.
Windsurf
Freemium · High reliability
AI IDE that provides step-by-step guidance for beginners and enterprise-grade security for professionals.
Lovable
Freemium · High reliability
Fastest platform for generating production-ready MVPs from simple natural language prompts.
Bolt.new
Freemium · High reliability
Browser-based builder for zero-setup full-stack development — no local installation required.
v0 by Vercel
Freemium · High reliability
Industry standard for generating high-quality React and Tailwind UI components from text prompts.
Ollama
Free · High reliability
Easiest way to self-host and run open-source LLMs locally — ideal for POPIA-conscious SA businesses.
Devstral 2
Free · High reliability
Mistral's open model specifically designed for agentic software engineering and autonomous coding tasks.
StarCoder 2
Free · Medium reliability
Open code model with the most auditable and transparent training data — critical for enterprise compliance.
IBM Granite Code
Free · Medium reliability
Family of code models trained on 116 programming languages with fully license-permissible training data.
Qwen3-Coder
Free · High reliability
Alibaba's most agentic code model to date, complete with a powerful CLI tool for terminal-driven development.
DataLab
Freemium · Medium reliability
Browser-based data science notebook that connects directly to CSVs and databases for fast analysis.
Softr
Freemium · High reliability
Visual builder for creating web apps, portals, and internal tools without writing code.
Bubble
Freemium · High reliability
Powerful visual no-code platform for building fully custom, complex web applications with a real database.
Onyx
Free · High reliability
Open-source platform that connects LLMs to your team's documents, apps, and internal knowledge.
BentoML
Free · Medium reliability
Flexible platform for serving AI models and custom inference pipelines in production environments.
Figma
Freemium · High reliability
Dominant design tool for product teams, now AI-enhanced with auto-layout, prototyping, and dev mode.
Framer
Freemium · High reliability
High-end web design and interactive prototyping tool often paired with Figma for production-ready sites.
NxCode
Freemium · Medium reliability
Full-stack AI app builder that generates frontend, backend, and database layers from natural language.
Amazon CodeWhisperer
Freemium · High reliability
AWS's AI code companion (now Amazon Q Developer) for code completion, security scans, and AWS-aware suggestions.
Blackbox AI
Freemium · Medium reliability
AI coding assistant offering autocomplete, code search, and chat across 20+ languages and IDEs.
Sourcegraph Cody
Freemium · High reliability
AI coding assistant with deep codebase context — answers questions and writes code grounded in your repo.
Mutable.ai
Freemium · Medium reliability
AI that auto-generates and maintains documentation, wikis, and architecture diagrams for your codebase.
Codeium
Freemium · High reliability
Free AI code completion, chat, and search — works across 70+ languages and most IDEs (also makers of Windsurf).
Phind
Freemium · High reliability
AI search engine for developers — answers technical questions with cited sources and runnable code examples.
